narrative: Iran-Strait of Hormuz tensions set up risk-off for the Tokyo open, likely to sustain crude bid and support CAD, AUD. EUR/USD closed Friday at 1.1726; ECB hold removes near-term downside risk but 175bp Fed-ECB differential caps upside. USD/JPY closed Friday at 159.33; BoJ meeting 28 Apr may see hawkish surprise, potentially pressuring USD/JPY.
